zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Anne le Strange於1462年出生在英國史洛普爾可諾金 在 奧斯維斯崔時，她的父親Sir Robert le Strange14歲，母親Elizabeth Norton20歲。她於1479年與Thomas de Eley Smythe在英國林可爾史爾武特比結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1546年4月16日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾武特比享年84歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Anne le Strange于1462年出生在英国史洛普爾可諾金 在 奧斯維斯崔时，她的父亲Sir Robert le Strange14岁，母亲Elizabeth Norton20岁。她于1479年与Thomas de Eley Smythe在英国林可爾史爾武特比结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1546年4月16日在英国英格兰林可爾史爾武特比享年84岁。

nameMeanings.name: le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Thanh, Hung, Minh, Dung, Tuan, Hai, Hoa, Thuy, Son, Anh, Long, Hoang.  Chinese Hong, Sang, Chi, Dong, Tong, Lai, Hang, Man, Han, Ho, Phoung, Chan.  Korean Tam, Phong, Nam, Thai, Tuong, Chung, Thach, Tinh, Manh, Tham, Uyen, Vang.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 樂, meaning ‘happiness’ in Chinese: from the first element of the personal name Le Fu (樂父), style name of Yan, son of the Duke Dai of Song (ruler of the state of Song, reigned 799–766  BC ). Yan's grandson Le Ju (樂莒) inherited Le (樂) as his surname.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 勒: (i) from the second element of the placename Shu-Le (疏勒), an ancient state (located in present-day Xinjiang Uyghur autonomous region) during the Western Han dynasty (206  BC –25  AD ). (ii) a surname near the Bohai Sea region during the Han dynasty (206  BC –220  AD ). (iii) a surname traced back to the Hun ethnic group in northern China during the Jin dynasty (265–420  AD ).

variants.name: Yue
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Chi, Feng, Gang, Wei, Chun, Guo, Jin, Kin, Ping, Yan, Yun, Zhang, Chau, Du, Hau, Hung, My, Sau.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 岳 (or 嶽), meaning ‘high mountain’ in Chinese: traced back to Si Yue (四岳 or 四嶽), said to be the title of an official post in charge of sacrificial rituals on the site of famous mountains during the reign of the legendary Emperor Yao (c. 24th century BC ) and Emperor Shun (c. 23rd century BC ).

variants.name: Lok
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Ping, Tat, Wing, Ying Lin, Chi Ming, Ching Wah, Chun, Chung Man, Han, Kam, Kam Tim, Kin.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surname 樂, see   Le   1.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 陸, 鹿, 逯 and 禄, see   Lu   5 and (7-9).

variants.name: Li
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ming, Li, Jian, Hong, Yan, Ping, Jing, Yong, Ying, Hui, Jin, Min, Chung.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 李, meaning ‘plum’: (i) said to have been adopted in place of the Chinese surname 理 (also pronounced Li; meaning ‘rules’ in Chinese) by Li Zhen (利貞), son of an official called Li Zheng (理徵) in the late Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). It is said that Li Zhen's father incurred the displeasure of King Zhou of Shang (died 1046  BC ) and Li Zhen fled to a wasteland area, where he survived on wild plums. After his return to civilization, he changed his surname to Li (李 ‘plum’), a word with the same pronunciation. The original surname, 理, is said to be from Li Guan (理官), the name of a post of officials in charge of legislation in ancient China. Li Er (李耳), also known as Lao Tzu or Lao Zi, traditionally regarded as the founder of Taoism, is believed to have been a descendant of Li Zhen. (ii) adopted as a surname by the Chi Li (叱李) family from the Xianbei ethnic group during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) in the early years of the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ), sixteen high officials with different surnames were granted the surname Li (李), the surname of the royal family of the Tang dynasty, by Emperor Taizong of Tang (died 649  BC ), because of their contributions to the establishment of the Tang regime. (iv) the surname can also be traced back to several minority ethnic groups in ancient China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 黎, meaning ‘black’ or ‘multitude’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from Li (黎), the name of an ancient state (located in Changzhi in Shanxi province) during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ), which was annexed in the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ) and later granted to Fengshu, also known as Li Hou (黎侯, 'Marquis Li'). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Su Li (素黎) family, members of the Xianbei ethnic group, during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).

nameMeanings.name: Strange
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Wiltshire and Gloucestershire): nickname for a newcomer to a district, from Middle English strange ‘foreign’ (Old French estrange, Latin extraneus, from extra ‘outside’).

Irish (Antrim): this name is also common in Ireland, where, in addition to its English etymology, it may represent an Anglicized form of any of several Irish names containing the element gall ‘stranger’, e.g. Doyle , Gallagher .

variants.name: Stranger
meanings: English: nickname for a newcomer to an area, from Middle English stra(u)nger(e) ‘stranger, foreigner’ (Old French estrangier). Compare Strange .

variants.name: Doyle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Sean, Kieran, Seamus, Aileen, Dermot, Liam, Niall, Brennan, Brigid, Conal, Conan, Donal.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Dubhghaill ‘descendant of Dubhghall’, a personal name composed of the elements dubh ‘black’ + gall ‘stranger’. This was used as a byname for Scandinavians, in particular to distinguish the darker-haired Danes from fair-haired Norwegians. Compare McDougall , McDowell .

variants.name: Lestrange
meanings: Irish and English: variant of Strange 1 with fused Old French definite article le.

Irish: in Ireland, adopted for Mac Conchoigchríche ‘son of Cúchoigcriche’, a personal name meaning ‘hound of the borderland’. Lestrange was adopted for Mac Conchoigchríche probably due to the presence of a prominent family of Lestrange, of similar meaning, who settled in the counties of Westmeath and Offaly in the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Anne le Strange was born in 1462, in Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, England, her father, Sir Robert le Strange, was 14 and her mother, Elizabeth Norton, was 20. She married Thomas de Eley Smythe in 1479, in Utterby, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 16 April 1546, in Utterby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 84.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Anne le Strange est née en 1462, à Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert le Strange, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Norton, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas d’Eley Smythe en 1479, à Utterby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 avril 1546, à Utterby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 84 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne le Strange è nata il nel 1462 nel Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, England, sua padre, Sir Robert le Strange, aveva 14 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Norton, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Thomas de Eley Smythe nel 1479, nel Utterby, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 16 aprile 1546, nel Utterby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 84 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Anne le Strangeが1462年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアノクイン イン オスウエストリーで生まれた時，父Sir Robert le Strangeは14歳，母Elizabeth Nortonは20歳であった。1479年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアウッテルビーでThomas de Eley Smytheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1546年4月16日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアウッテルビーで84歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Anne le Strange(이)가 1462년 영국 슈럽실르 노킨 인 오스베스트리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert le Strange(은)는 14세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Norton(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1479년 영국 링코실르 우터비에서 Thomas de Eley Smythe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1546년 4월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 우터비에서 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Anne le Strange родилась в 1462 г. в местности ноккин ин освестри, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert le Strange было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Norton, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Eley Smythe в 1479 г. в местности уттирби, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 16 апреля 1546 г. в местности уттирби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 84 лет.

Murió el 16 de abril de 1546, en Utterby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 84 años.
